caption: A man is positioned against a plain, light-colored wall, wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black headset with a microphone. The name "Ashish Raichur" appears in small white text in the bottom left corner of each scene. He begins by looking forward with a neutral expression, bringing his right hand toward his chin in a contemplative gesture. As the sequence progresses, he opens his mouth and tilts his head slightly upward. In the final scene, he becomes more animated, raising both arms and spreading his fingers wide in a descriptive gesture while continuing to speak. The setting remains constant throughout, with the focus solely on the man's upper body and his changing facial expressions and hand movements.
